name: Pitfall
overview: Pitfall follows Pitfall Harry, his adventurous niece Rhonda, and their hilariously timid companion Quickclaw the Mountain Lion as they trek through dense jungles in search of hidden treasures. Each episode drops the trio into a new expedition filled with traps, creatures, puzzles, and classic Saturday‑morning cartoon danger. Blending light comedy with action, the series delivers kid‑friendly adventure built around exploration, teamwork, and the thrill of uncovering the unknown.
